message:
test(fuzz): grow corpus by 660 inputs across 5 targets

cargo-fuzz run discovered new coverage-increasing inputs during this
session's fuzzing pass. Per the existing pattern in fuzz/corpus/* (1985
inputs already tracked), these get committed so every fuzzer starts
from the accumulated corpus instead of cold.

Breakdown of new inputs:
  config_yaml      159
  jsonl_import     192
  markdown_import   84
  merge_issue       74
  search_issues    151
  ────────────────────
  total            660

Each file is the raw byte input that triggered a new coverage edge;
filenames are sha1(content). No crashes were reproduced — corpus growth
only, no artifacts/ entries. Re-running cargo fuzz with these committed
should give the next session a faster head start on rare paths.
